message:
fix(tests): gate upgrade tests behind self_update feature and fix ambiguous ID detection

Add #[cfg(feature = "self_update")] guards to all upgrade-related e2e
tests and helpers so they compile and run only when the self_update
feature is enabled. This prevents test compilation failures in
configurations that omit the feature.

Fix the ambiguous ID detection logic in e2e_ambiguous_id to use pairwise
first-character comparison instead of single-character occurrence
counting across all hashes, matching how the resolver actually uses
contains(). Increase the retry limit from 20 to 30 to accommodate the
stricter matching. Remove unused HashMap import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
